feature: Phase 18 — Enterprise Interop + Imaging Platform Integration
deliverables: A: Integration Registry Model (11 types, per-tenant store, health monitoring)
B: Admin Integration API (CRUD, probe, toggle, health-summary, error-log)
C: Imaging Integration Service (studies, viewer-url, metadata, DICOMweb, OHIF)
D: Device Onboarding (config-not-code, modality worklist fields)
E: Admin Console UI (3-tab: Registry, Device Onboarding, Legacy Connectors)
F: Imaging Views in CPRS Web (ReportsPanel status, study list, viewer launch)
G: Remote Data Viewer Upgrade (registry-aware external sources)
H: Metrics + Audit (5 new audit actions, integration health in /metrics)
